comment: Nice content very buggy app. For example half the time clicking on creator icon just shows blank screen. Switching by swiping right automatically plays wrong audio (it's the same as video you were on, so you get new video and wrong audio). It's a mess. P.s. problems still persist. 100500 steps required to actually report them are not helping. Seriously add a freaking text field to "describe a problem" instead of 5 levels of menus and NOT being able to report the bug in the end. Horrible UX
key sentence: creator icon, swiping right, report problem, text field, menus, horrible UX
the function of activity: This activity involves various tasks such as searching for contacts, playing, pausing, liking, sharing, and reporting videos, as well as managing user profiles and interactions(following list, follower, like,favorites,private,draft).
